FSM_SUB_CLASSES

Table for storing FSM subclasses. Subclasses allow multiple transition flows per class. If no subclass is required, MASTER is used.

Columns
fsc_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key.

fsc_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_CLASSES, constraining the subclass per class.

fsc_pti_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Translatable item, reference to PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM.

fsc_active (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag indicating whether the subclass is currently used.

Dependencies
fsc_pti_id, fsc_fcl_id

references <PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM> (pti_uid, pti_upmg)
